caseName: Fairbanks, Morse & Co. v. American Valve & Meter Co.
caseNameFull: FAIRBANKS, MORSE & COMPANY Et Al. v. AMERICAN VALVE & METER COMPANY Et Al.
attorneys: Messrs. Fred L. Chappell, Carroll J. Lord, and Howard M. Cox were on the brief for petitioners., Mr. Frank A. Whitely was on the brief for respondents.
